nine_schools.title: Unlock and cast at least one spell from all 9 ISS magic schools — complete the school circuit

abyssal_beam.title: Cast the Abyssal Beam (T.O. Magic / traveloptics: ISS addon) — the final payoff of the Leviathan kill in Ch11

subtitle.text: 9 schools. All circuits complete. The Abyssal Beam is the final spell — unlocked by the Leviathan kill in Ch11.

description: CH.17 · THE ARCHMAGE
▸ Iron's Spellbooks has 9 magic schools.',
The Archmage has cast from all 9.',
The Abyssal Beam is the T.O. Magic addon payoff —',
it requires the Leviathan kill from Ch11 as a prerequisite.',
The spell thread that started in Ch07-08 (first ISS spells)',
ends here with the most powerful spell in the pack.',
◈ THE 9 ISS MAGIC SCHOOLS
└ Fire: offensive, AoE burn, Ignis synergy',
└ Ice: slow/freeze, crowd control',
└ Lightning: chain damage, conductor synergy',
└ Holy: healing, undead bonus damage, divine interactions',
└ Ender: Eldritch school — void entities, End dimension bonus',
└ Blood: lifesteal, sustain, HP sacrifice mechanics',
└ Evocation: summon constructs, spectral entities',
└ Void: abyssal damage, dimensional mechanics',
└ Nature: growth, resistance, terrain effects',
└ Complete: cast one spell from each school to fill the circuit',
◈ ABYSSAL BEAM (T.O. MAGIC / TRAVELOPTICS:)
└ T.O. Magic is an ISS addon mod (namespace: traveloptics:)',
NOT a travel mod — it is an ISS extension',
└ Abyssal Beam: high-damage void projectile',
Unlocked from: Leviathan kill (Ch11 — boss scroll drops)',
Source: leviathan drops traveloptics: materials for the spell',
└ Effect: fires a sustained void beam, high damage vs any entity',
└ Mastery Age bonus: traveloptics: may gain additional effects',
after the Phase 17 Mastery Age transition',
◈ ARCHMAGE LOADOUT
└ Primary weapon: Abyssal Beam (T.O. Magic) + Void Tendril (Eldritch)',
└ Sustain: Blood school spells + Ring of Mana',
└ AOE opener: Lightning Chain + Fire school bombardment',
└ Crowd control: Ice school freeze on arrival',
└ Focus + Spell Book: highest tier (check JEI for irons_spellbooks:)',
▸ The Leviathan was killed in Ch11.',
The materials it dropped have been in storage since.',
The Abyssal Beam was the reason.',
This is the payoff.',
6 chapters of preparation for one spell.',
That is what the schools were building toward.',
Cast it.',
▶ Cast spells from all 9 ISS schools [check]
▶ Cast the Abyssal Beam (T.O. Magic) [check]
◇ The Archmage is not a class in this pack.',
It is a state reached by completing every school.',
There is no UI label for it.',
The label is: all 9 schools active, Abyssal Beam equipped.',
That is what the archmage looks like.
